title: Luffy Stands Through the Poison — Part 6
scene: On pages 22–24, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. The Baratie battle turns into a test of will as Luffy keeps challenging Krieg despite poison, weapons, and exhaustion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whether he wins or loses this match,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: W-Who's going to win this fight now...?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You dumbass! That was just a fluke! A fluke!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
